case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOSE ADONIAS REDONDO FLORES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SANTA CASTILLO, ASSISTANT MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, JOSE ADONIAS REDONDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JOSE ADONIAS REDONDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED JAN-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JOSE ADONIAS REDONDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC., REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO, ASSISTANT MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ADONIAS REDONDO FLORES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
